## nsc token refresh

Refresh a token.

```
nsc token refresh [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                        help for refresh
      --minimum_duration duration   Ensure the token remains valid for at least this duration (default 0s)
  -o, --output string               Output format: table, json (default "table")
      --token_id string             The token ID to refresh
```

* [nsc token](nsc_token.md)	 - Manage revokable tokens.
